title: Environmental DNA (eDNA) Extraction with Modified Qiagen DNeasy Kit
author: Collin Closek
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yrqfv5w
materials: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue kit

steps.title: Nucleic acids were extracted from the...
steps.instruction: Nucleic acids were extracted from the filters using the Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit with some modifications to the manufacturer’s protocol.

steps.title: Prior to extraction, 0
steps.instruction: Prior to extraction, 0.5 mm and 0.1 mm glass beads (BioSpec Products) transferred to glass beaker, covered with tin foil, and ashed at 500 °C for 5 hours.
0.75 g of each bead size was distributed into sterile 5 ml extraction tubes, the tubes with caps loosened were subsequently autoclaved and UV treated for 30 min.

steps.title: To serve as a control in...
steps.instruction: To serve as a control in each set of extractions, an additional empty tube with beads was carried through the process as an extraction blank.

steps.title: Ashed beads were added to sample...
steps.instruction: Ashed beads were added to sample filters tubes with subsequent bead beating steps as in Djurhuus et al., 2017, and then incubated at 56 °C overnight with 900 μl Buffer ATL and 100 μl Proteinase K (Qiagen).

steps.title: Bead free supernatant was transferred to...
steps.instruction: Bead free supernatant was transferred to 2 ml tube, 650 μl Buffer AL was added, and then briefly vortexed. An additional 650 μl Ethanol (96-100%, molecular grade) was added, then vortexed briefly.

steps.title: Mixture was added into mini spin column (650 μl, 3x)
steps.instruction: Mixture was added into mini spin column (650 μl, 3x). Remaining steps followed the manufacturer’s protocol for the DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit.

steps.title: Samples were subsequently diluted 1:10 for...
steps.instruction: Samples were subsequently diluted 1:10 for 12S rRNA gene amplicon and metabarcoding preparation.
